'''鈭歠-n-dh-b''' ('''kafandheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tilt|tilt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tilt|tilt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-n-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kafandheboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifandheboko|thifandheboko]] || [[word:jifandheboko|jifandheboko]] || [[word:shifandheboko|shifandheboko]] || [[word:kifandheboko|kifandheboko]]
